response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings genuine technical depth across distributed systems and full-stack engineering, with an impressive tenure spanning 17+ years. However, the role demands a Principal-level specialist with direct experience in experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, and statistical rollout analysis — none of which appear in this resume. His current Staff-level title and the absence of any growth engineering, metrics infrastructure, or experimentation framework work represent a fundamental mismatch with the IC6 seniority and core specialization this position requires.
strengths: Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Current hands-on AI tooling work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, aligning with the role's AI-acceleration preference
Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, C, C++, Java, DLang, C#) with full-stack and embedded systems range across 17+ years
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment/targeting, or rollout automation in any role
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure experience; data aptitude appears limited to pricing optimization, with no statistical analysis or experimental design work

Seniority gap: candidate holds Staff/Senior titles and the resume does not demonstrate Principal-level technical leadership, cross-team systems ownership, or multi-workstream initiative leadership at the required scale

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics platform background
